name: Luxury Watch Lead Gen - AI Classifier

parameters.jsCode:
// No media available - skip Gemini entirely, auto-classify as low priority
const profile = $json;

return [{
  json: {
    username: profile.username,
    platform: profile.platform || 'instagram',
    full_name: profile.full_name,
    bio: profile.bio,
    follower_count: profile.follower_count,
    following_count: profile.following_count,
    post_count: profile.post_count,
    is_verified: profile.is_verified,
    is_business: profile.is_business,
    business_category: profile.business_category,
    external_url: profile.external_url,
    email_in_bio: profile.email_in_bio,
    phone_in_bio: profile.phone_in_bio,
    engagement_rate: profile.engagement_rate,
    profile_url: profile.profile_url || `https://instagram.com/${profile.username}`,
    seed_account: profile.seed_account,
    seed_type: profile.seed_type,
    classification: 'irrelevant',
    confidence: 'none',
    watch_brands: '',
    specific_watches: '',
    total_collection_value: 'unknown',
    net_worth_tier: 'unknown',
    wealth_signals: '',
    ownership_type: 'unclear',
    sourcing_potential: 'none',
    sourcing_reasoning: 'No images available - cannot verify watch ownership without visual evidence',
    approach_suggestion: 'Skip - revisit only if images become available',
    priority_score: 0,
    ai_reasoning: 'Automatically skipped: no media available for visual verification',
    vision_summary: 'No images available',
    images_analyzed: 0,
    classified_date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]
  }
}];

// Format clean output for Relevant Leads sheet
const d = $json;
return [{
  json: {
    username: d.username,
    full_name: d.full_name,
    classification: d.classification,
    priority_score: d.priority_score,
    confidence: d.confidence,
    profile_url: d.profile_url,
    follower_count: d.follower_count,
    post_count: d.post_count,
    is_verified: d.is_verified,
    is_business: d.is_business,
    business_category: d.business_category,
    bio: (d.bio || '').substring(0, 300),
    watch_brands: d.watch_brands,
    specific_watches: d.specific_watches,
    total_collection_value: d.total_collection_value,
    net_worth_tier: d.net_worth_tier,
    ownership_type: d.ownership_type,
    sourcing_potential: d.sourcing_potential,
    approach_suggestion: d.approach_suggestion,
    wealth_signals: d.wealth_signals,
    email_in_bio: d.email_in_bio,
    phone_in_bio: d.phone_in_bio,
    external_url: d.external_url,
    engagement_rate: d.engagement_rate,
    vision_summary: d.vision_summary,
    ai_reasoning: d.ai_reasoning,
    seed_account: d.seed_account,
    seed_type: d.seed_type,
    classified_date: d.classified_date
  }
}];
